ns0:entry.ns0:title: OpenAPITools/openapi-generator
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/OpenAPITools/openapi-generator
Language: java
OpenAPI Generator allows generation of API client libraries (SDK generation), server stubs, documentation and configuration automatically given an OpenAPI Spec (v2, v3)

ns0:entry.ns0:title: StarRocks/starrocks
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/StarRocks/starrocks
Language: java
The world's fastest open query engine for sub-second analytics both on and off the data lakehouse. With the flexibility to support nearly any scenario, StarRocks provides best-in-class performance for multi-dimensional analytics, real-time analytics, and ad-hoc queries. A Linux Foundation project.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: TGX-Android/Telegram-X
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/TGX-Android/Telegram-X
Language: java
The main repository of Telegram X — official alternative Telegram client for Android.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: YunaiV/yudao-cloud
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/YunaiV/yudao-cloud
Language: java
ruoyi-vue-pro 全新 Cloud 版本，优化重构所有功能。基于 Spring Cloud Alibaba + MyBatis Plus + Vue & Element 实现的后台管理系统 + 用户小程序，支持 RBAC 动态权限、多租户、数据权限、工作流、三方登录、支付、短信、商城、CRM、ERP、MES、IM、AI 大模型、IoT 物联网等功能。你的 ⭐️ Star ⭐️，是作者生发的动力！

ns0:entry.ns0:title: aeron-io/aeron
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/aeron-io/aeron
Language: java
Efficient reliable UDP unicast, UDP multicast, and IPC message transport

ns0:entry.ns0:title: agentscope-ai/agentscope-java
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/agentscope-ai/agentscope-java
Language: java
AgentScope Java: Agent-Oriented Programming for Building LLM Applications

ns0:entry.ns0:title: apache/camel
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/apache/camel
Language: java
Apache Camel is an open source integration framework that empowers you to quickly and easily integrate various systems consuming or producing data.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: apache/nifi
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/apache/nifi
Language: java
Apache NiFi

ns0:entry.ns0:title: apache/seatunnel
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/apache/seatunnel
Language: java
SeaTunnel is a multimodal, high-performance, distributed, massive data integration tool.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: camunda/camunda
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/camunda/camunda
Language: java
Process Orchestration Framework

ns0:entry.ns0:title: checkstyle/checkstyle
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/checkstyle/checkstyle
Language: java
Checkstyle is a development tool to help programmers write Java code that adheres to a coding standard. By default it supports the Google Java Style Guide and Sun Code Conventions, but is highly configurable. It can be invoked with an ANT task and a command line program.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: conductor-oss/conductor
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/conductor-oss/conductor
Language: java
Conductor is an event driven agentic orchestration platform providing durable and highly resilient execution engine for applications and AI Agents

ns0:entry.ns0:title: dependency-check/DependencyCheck
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/dependency-check/DependencyCheck
Language: java
OWASP dependency-check is a software composition analysis utility that detects publicly disclosed vulnerabilities in application dependencies.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: elastic/elasticsearch
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/elastic/elasticsearch
Language: java
Free and Open Source, Distributed, RESTful Search Engine

ns0:entry.ns0:title: flowable/flowable-engine
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/flowable/flowable-engine
Language: java
A compact and highly efficient workflow and Business Process Management (BPM) platform for developers, system admins and business users.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: iflytek/astron-agent
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/iflytek/astron-agent
Language: java
Enterprise-grade, commercial-friendly agentic workflow platform for building next-generation SuperAgents.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: kestra-io/kestra
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/kestra-io/kestra
Language: java
Event Driven Orchestration & Scheduling Platform for Mission Critical Applications

ns0:entry.ns0:title: kunal-kushwaha/DSA-Bootcamp-Java
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/kunal-kushwaha/DSA-Bootcamp-Java
Language: java
This repository consists of the code samples, assignments, and notes for the Java data structures & algorithms + interview preparation bootcamp of WeMakeDevs.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: spring-projects/spring-framework
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/spring-projects/spring-framework
Language: java
Spring Framework

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/traccar/traccar
Language: java

ns0:entry.ns0:title: trinodb/trino
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/trinodb/trino
Language: java
Official repository of Trino, the distributed SQL query engine for big data, formerly known as PrestoSQL (https://trino.io)
